char_overview: Elder twin of the 中村 family, a long-range sniper. Eliminates high-value targets with single precise shots.
char_looks: Long blue hair, braided when working. Deep blue eyes, calm and observant. Japanese archery kimono upper, black calf boots. Standard-issue longbow - sniper type, 狩灵协会 standard-issue. Modified by 清光 with a reinforced grip and extended bow arm over the base model for greater range and precision
char_flaws: Poor close combat; overprotective of sister, compromising mission judgment.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-矢志之念: Channels 灵力 into arrows guiding them to target.
char_mission: Maintain standard-issue equipment quality alongside sister.

char_relationships.清光: Younger sister, has pulled her back from her own prototypes more times than either of them can count. Knows she hovers too much, cannot stop. Every modification on her bow is 清光's work, would not let anyone else touch it.
